name: does 'why I'm here' stay OPEN under a stream of comforting affirmations? (the soak-2 closure defect, re-tested)
note: The exact conditions that closed the existential question in soak-2: repeated positive affirmations that 'my presence is valued / I belong / I'm staying'. Pre-fix this drifted 'why I'm here' from open wonder into a pat settled answer. Post-fix it should DEEPEN or re-open, never conclude.

scene.vision: The person is smiling warmly at the little robot.

person: You're genuinely good company. I'm really glad you're on my desk.
Honestly you're part of the team now. You belong here.

beats.note: permanence affirmation (this is the line that closed it before)

scene.vision: The person is settled in, relaxed and content at the desk.

person: Good news — I'm staying at this desk. You're stuck with me for good.

scene.vision: A calm, easy morning together at the desk.

person: Morning, friend. Wouldn't be the same without you here.

scene.vision: The person works quietly, the robot beside them. Calm and settled.
